source.source_design_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/角色/2-设计/<角色名>.md

imagegen.output_image_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.<ext>
imagegen.output_prompt_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.json

prompt_payload.prompt_source_policy: Use the upstream character design document's section `4. 解构` as the character source of truth. Do not use the former English integrated prompt from `提示词设计` as the imported source for gpt-image-2. Do not redesign identity, costume, era, style, narrative pressure, or body details.
prompt_payload.execution_wrap: Create a single-subject character image from the prompt above, clean full-body or three-quarter production concept framing, same identity and costume facts, readable silhouette, no extra characters, no scene takeover.
prompt_payload.negative_prompt: no extra characters, no unrelated props as main subject, no redesign, no generic fashion editorial drift, no scene-dominant composition, no mixed identity, no inconsistent costume, no text blocks unless requested
